checks.name: runtime_integration_rerun
checks.note: A first standalone concurrent run reported one transient failure; immediate full rerun passed 211/211, while the canonical full suite had already passed 1743/1743.

summary: Final HEAD passes the independent-review, runtime-adapter, connector, guarded-run, safe-action, and production-composed acceptance surface, including pass, needs_changes, and block through the production composer and restart from a reserved record checkpoint. The complete full suite passed 1743/1743 outside the restricted sandbox. The same conformance command reports 69 violations for origin/main and 69 for this HEAD; no violation or Story budget overage was added.
